name: Town Of Us Mira
author: AU Avengers
description: Town of Us Reactivated, rebuilt using MiraAPI with full Android support. 50+ unique roles including Sheriff, Jester, Lover and more.

name: Mira API
author: All Of Us Mods
description: A thorough Among Us modding API. Required by many mods. Provides clean interfaces for creating modifications with full Android support.

name: SuperNewRoles
author: SuperNewRoles
description: Japan's popular mod with 150+ roles and 1,000+ cosmetics! One of the most feature-rich mods available with full Android support.

name: Speed Hack (Lua Example)
author: AstralDev
description: A Lua mod example for Astral Launcher. Demonstrates the Lua API: speed hack and basic ESP. A starting template for mod devs.
